functions.name: exists
functions.description: Check whether a file exists at the given path, relative to the Thunderbird profile directory.

parameters.name: relativePath
parameters.description: Path relative to the profile directory (e.g. 'TbSync/accounts68.json').

functions.name: readJSON
functions.description: Read and parse a UTF-8 JSON file at the given path, relative to the Thunderbird profile directory. Returns null if the file is missing or unparseable.

parameters.name: relativePath
parameters.description: Path relative to the profile directory.
